player.description: Ninja warrior top-down view, dark hooded ninja with glowing crimson eyes, black and purple outfit, katana, shadowy aura

enemy.description: Yokai oni demon enemy top-down view, horned demon with glowing green eyes, dark red and black skin, supernatural aura

boss.description: Giant yokai shogun demon boss top-down view, multiple horns, toxic green energy, crimson and black armor, skull mask

soulEssence.description: Glowing soul essence collectible orb, ethereal purple and magenta spirit energy with wisps

crystal.description: Dark energy crystal power-up, deep violet and black crystal with inner glow and arcane runes

token.description: Shadow Dojo Token SDT coin icon for CrossRamp

playerBullet.description: Shuriken ninja star projectile, metallic dark steel throwing star with crimson red energy glow trails

enemyBullet.description: Demonic fireball projectile, dark green and black hell fire orb with crackling dark energy sparks

dojo.description: Dark Japanese dojo temple background, nighttime with dark purple and crimson sky, pagodas and torii gates, mystical fog
